name: Vijam the Cubic Seed
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>方</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>胤</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ヴィジャム
desc: Cannot be destroyed by battle. At the end of the Damage Step, if this card battled an opponent's monster: You can place this card face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell Card, and if you do, place 1 Cubic Counter on that opponent's monster. (Monsters with a Cubic Counter cannot attack, also negate their effects.) If this card is treated as a Continuous Spell Card by this effect, during your Main Phase: You can Special Summon this card from your Spell & Trap Zone.
mnst_eff: Cannot be destroyed by battle. At the end of the Damage Step, if this card battled an opponent's monster: You can place this card face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell Card, and if you do, place 1 Cubic Counter on that opponent's monster. (Monsters with a Cubic Counter cannot attack, also negate their effects.) If this card is treated as a Continuous Spell Card by this effect, during your Main Phase: You can Special Summon this card from your Spell & Trap Zone.
eff: Cannot be destroyed by battle. (Monsters with a Cubic Counter cannot attack, also negate their effects.) If this card is treated as a Continuous Spell Card by this effect, during your Main Phase: You can Special Summon this card from your Spell & Trap Zone.

sets.set: Yu-Gi-Oh! The Dark Side of Dimensions Movie Pack
Yu-Gi-Oh! The Dark Side of Dimensions Movie Pack: Gold Edition
Yu-Gi-Oh! The Dark Side of Dimensions Movie Pack Secret Edition

action: Places itself in Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
